title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at VRL Logistics - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at VRL Logistics - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the VRL Logistics family as a Distribution Manager in Allahabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About VRL Logistics:
VRL Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with VRL Logistics!
